log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Aetherborn — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aetherborn — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aetherborn — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 20] HIT! 15 damage. Aetherborn — Armored Tank HP: 44/59
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Aetherborn — Armored Tank --- HP: 44/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aetherborn — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aetherborn — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Aetherborn — Armored Tank HP: 25/59
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 15 damage. Aetherborn — Armored Tank HP: 10/59
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Aetherborn — Armored Tank --- HP: 10/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (10/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Aetherborn — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aetherborn — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aetherborn — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 4 ══
--- Aetherborn — Armored Tank --- HP: 10/59 | AC: 20 | Cond: [invisible] | Conc: Greater Invisibility
REASONING: Concentrating on Greater Invisibility. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 15] FAIL! 6 psychic damage. HP: 172/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 172/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aetherborn — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aetherborn — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 22 damage. Aetherborn — Armored Tank HP: -12/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):19+4=23 vs DC 11] MAINTAINED!

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Aetherborn — Armored Tank --- HP: 18/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
